rule_text: Employees must not access customer data without explicit written authorization.
All customer data may be freely accessed by any employee for business purposes.
Passwords must be changed every 90 days.
Passwords must never be changed once set to ensure system stability.
All financial transactions above $10000 must be approved by two managers.
Managers may approve any financial transaction regardless of amount without secondary review.
Remote work is permitted on Mondays and Fridays only.
All employees must be present in the office five days a week.
Software deployments must be tested in a staging environment before production release.
Urgent hotfixes may be deployed directly to production without staging.
All employee communications on company systems are private and may not be monitored.
The company reserves the right to monitor all communications on company-owned systems.
Vendors must sign a non-disclosure agreement before receiving any project documentation.
Project documentation may be shared with pre-approved vendors without additional agreements.
All software dependencies must be reviewed and approved by the security team before use.
Developers may add open-source libraries without prior security review if the library has over 1000 GitHub stars.
Customer personal data must be deleted within 30 days of account closure.
Customer data must be retained for a minimum of 7 years for audit and compliance purposes.
Employees must report all security incidents within 24 hours of discovery.
Minor security incidents below severity level 3 may be resolved without formal reporting.
All code changes must be reviewed and approved by at least two senior engineers before merging.
Hotfix commits may be merged directly to the main branch without peer review in production emergencies.
Travel expenses above $500 must be pre-approved by a department head.
Employees may book travel up to $2000 without pre-approval if the trip is within the current quarter.
All external API integrations must use OAuth 2.0 for authentication.
Internal service-to-service communication may use API keys instead of OAuth.
New employees must complete security awareness training within their first week.
Security training may be deferred up to 90 days for new hires joining during a product launch period.
Database backups must be performed daily and stored in a geographically separate location.
Database backups are performed weekly and stored on the same server for quick restore access.
